events.title: Bazan oil refinery (Haifa) struck by Iranian missiles
events.detail: Iranian missile barrage damaged refinery; fire contained.

events.title: SAMREF refinery (Yanbu) hit by Iranian attack
events.detail: Saudi-US joint venture refinery struck on Red Sea coast; part of Iranian counterattacks on Gulf energy sites.

events.title: Valero Port Arthur refinery explosion
events.detail: 435,000 bpd refinery exploded ~7:30pm CDT; 5-hr fire; shelter-in-place lifted next day; industrial heater suspected; no injuries.

events.title: Israeli strike on Shahr-e Rey oil depot
events.detail: Major fuel depot in south Tehran struck in coordinated Israeli air campaign on Iranian oil infrastructure.

events.title: Israeli strike on Shahran oil depot
events.detail: Northwest Tehran fuel storage facility hit; large fires; civilian casualties reported.

events.title: Israeli strike on Aghdasieh oil depot
events.detail: Northeast Tehran fuel depot struck during Israeli air campaign on Iranian fuel infrastructure.

events.title: Israeli strike on Fardis oil depot (Karaj)
events.detail: Fuel depot west of Tehran hit; Israeli campaign aimed at "breaking resilience" per Iranian officials.

events.title: Skylight oil tanker struck by projectile
events.detail: Tanker hit north of Khasab; 2 Indian crew killed, 3 injured; remaining 20 evacuated.

events.title: MKD VYOM tanker hit by drone boat
events.detail: Drone boat strike sparked engine room fire and explosion; 1 Indian sailor killed; 21 crew evacuated.

events.title: 2026 Iran war begins: US/Israel airstrikes on Iran
events.detail: Joint US-Israeli air war launched against Iran; decapitation strike kills Supreme Leader Khamenei. Largest oil supply disruption in IEA history follows.

events.title: Iran IRGC closes Strait of Hormuz to merchant traffic
events.detail: IRGC forbids passage; 21+ confirmed attacks on merchant ships and reported sea mines laid; largest oil supply disruption in history per IEA.

events.title: Drone strike on Moscow oil depot
events.detail: Fuel storage facility ignited near Moscow ring road.

events.title: Bandar Abbas (Shahid Rajaee port) explosion
events.detail: Massive explosion at Iran’s largest container port; >40 dead, 1000+ injured.

events.title: Tehran refinery fire
events.detail: Fire at the Shahid Tondgooyan refinery; two contractor deaths reported.

events.title: Cuba grid collapse: nationwide blackout
events.detail: Antonio Guiteras thermal plant failure caused total grid failure; fuel shortage cited as root cause.

events.title: Sounion tanker abandoned after attack, leaks oil
events.detail: Greek-flagged tanker drifted on fire for weeks; major spill risk.

events.title: Greece restricts public-sector AC during heatwave
events.detail: Ministry of Environment limits AC to 27°C in government offices.

events.title: M/V Wind tanker struck by Houthi missile
events.detail: Panama-flagged vessel disabled; rescued by Iranian Navy.

events.title: Drone strike on Kuibyshev refinery (Samara)
events.detail: Rosneft refinery hit; processing unit damaged.

events.title: Drone strike on NORSI refinery (Nizhny Novgorod)
events.detail: One of Russia’s largest refineries; primary unit damaged, ~50% capacity offline.

events.title: Ecuador declares energy emergency
events.detail: President declared emergency over electricity rationing tied to drought-hit hydro and fuel imports.

events.title: Marlin Luanda tanker hit by Houthi missile
events.detail: Naphtha cargo ignited; international firefighting effort over 24+ hours.

events.title: Houthi forces seize Galaxy Leader tanker
events.detail: Helicopter-borne attack in southern Red Sea; vessel diverted to Hodeidah.

events.title: Marathon Garyville LA refinery fire
events.detail: Naphtha leak ignited; large plume visible 30+ miles; mandatory evacuation.

events.title: Egypt expands rolling power cuts amid fuel imports squeeze
events.detail: State imposed 3-hour daily blackouts; foreign currency shortage limited diesel imports.

events.title: Tokyo issues power-saving advisory for summer
events.detail: METI requested ~3% reduction across Tokyo grid, July-September.

events.title: Marathon Galveston Bay refinery tank fire
events.detail: Naphtha tank ignited; 6 hours to contain; no casualties.

events.title: Cuba declares national fuel and electricity emergency
events.detail: Rolling nationwide blackouts; oil supply shortfall of >40%.

events.title: France triggers strategic reserves over refinery strike
events.detail: Government released emergency reserves; >30% of stations dry in some regions.

events.title: Germany mandates 19°C max in public offices, no heated pools
events.detail: EnSikuMaV ordinance - 6-month emergency consumption reduction.

events.title: Switzerland publishes 4-stage gas rationing plan
events.detail: Stages from voluntary savings to forced industrial cuts and rolling blackouts.

events.title: Italy: AC max 27°C in offices, schools, public buildings
events.detail: Operazione Termostato - reduce gas consumption by ~4 BCM/year.

events.title: Spain caps AC at 27°C, heating at 19°C in public buildings
events.detail: Royal Decree 14/2022 - applies to offices, shops, transport hubs; lights off in unused windows after 10pm.

events.title: France bans AC with open doors; outdoor lit signs off 1am-6am
events.detail: Decree 2022-1004 - €750 fines for violations; expanded to all municipalities.

events.title: Sri Lanka declares nationwide fuel emergency
events.detail: Government suspended non-essential fuel sales for 2 weeks amid economic collapse.

events.title: Pakistan announces nationwide energy conservation emergency
events.detail: Markets ordered closed by 8:30pm, weekly holidays expanded to cut fuel consumption.

events.title: BP Whiting refinery shutdown after fire
events.detail: 435,000 bpd Indiana refinery taken offline; midwest gasoline prices spiked.
